name: LAM RESEARCH CORP
summary: Lam Research Corporation, incorporated in 1980 and headquartered in Fremont, California, is a global supplier of wafer fabrication equipment and services to the semiconductor industry. The company offers deposition, etch, and clean products including the ALTUS, SABRE, VECTOR, Kiyo, Flex, and EOS families, along with customer support services through its CSBG group, serving memory, foundry, and IDM customers worldwide.

products.name: SABRE family
products.description: Electrochemical deposition systems for copper and other metal films used in interconnect and packaging applications.

products.name: ALTUS family
products.description: CVD and ALD systems for tungsten and molybdenum deposition in semiconductor devices.

products.name: VECTOR family
products.description: Plasma-enhanced CVD systems for dielectric film deposition.

products.name: Striker family
products.description: Dielectric film deposition system using ALD and gapfill processes.

products.name: SPEED family
products.description: High-density plasma CVD system for dielectric film deposition.

products.name: Kiyo family
products.description: Reactive ion etch system for conductor etch applications.

products.name: Versys Metal family
products.description: Reactive ion etch system for conductor etch applications.

products.name: Flex family
products.description: Reactive ion etch system for dielectric etch applications.

products.name: Vantex family
products.description: Reactive ion etch system for dielectric etch applications.

products.name: Syndion family
products.description: Deep reactive ion etch system for through-silicon via (TSV) etch applications.

products.name: EOS
products.description: Wet clean system for wafer cleaning applications.

products.name: DV-Prime
products.description: Wet clean system for wafer cleaning applications.

products.name: Da Vinci
products.description: Wet clean system for wafer cleaning applications.

products.name: SP Series
products.description: Wet clean system for wafer cleaning applications.

products.name: Coronus family
products.description: Dry plasma clean system for bevel cleaning applications.

products.name: Reliant product line
products.description: New and refurbished non-leading edge deposition, etch, and clean products for less advanced applications.

products.name: Equipment Intelligence solutions
products.description: Fleet-level services to optimize system uptime, throughput, and defect reduction for customers.

products.name: Customer Support Business Group (CSBG)
products.description: Provides spares, upgrades, customer service, and lifecycle support for installed wafer fabrication equipment.

partnerships.description: Collaborative close-to-customer focus with semiconductor ecosystem partners for joint development and process innovation.
